headline: Broadridge ETF Report Links Lower Costs To Valuation Opportunity
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) has released a new report on recent ETF launches and how product design is changing. The company highlights that technology is cutting the cost and complexity of starting and running ETFs. Broadridge points to a lower survival threshold for new funds as more issuers outsource core ETF functions. Broadridge Financial Solutions, currently trading at $157.42, is putting a spotlight on how ETF market structure is changing and what that could mean for...
